---
output:
  html_document: 
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">

## Protocol as submitted to CIHR
      
Protocol can be found [here](files/proposal.pdf)

## Consent forms
          
              
* [English](files/eng.pdf)                
* [French](files/fr.pdf)
